title: Twitter/X Profile Scraper & Discovery
description: Discovers and scrapes public Twitter/X profiles by category and location, or scrapes a specific list of usernames.

mode.title: Run Mode
mode.description: full = discover profiles then scrape them; discovery_only = only find usernames; scrape_profiles = scrape the profileUsernames list directly.

region.title: Region Preset
region.description: Pre-configured region with relevant categories and locations. Choose 'custom' to specify your own.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Content categories to discover (used when region = custom or to override preset).

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Geographic locations to search within (used when region = custom or to override preset).

profileUsernames.title: Profile Usernames (scrape_profiles mode)
profileUsernames.description: List of Twitter/X usernames to scrape directly. Used when mode = scrape_profiles. Include or omit the @ prefix.

maxProfiles.title: Max Profiles to Scrape
maxProfiles.description: Maximum number of profiles to scrape (0 = unlimited).

minFollowers.title: Minimum Followers Filter
minFollowers.description: Skip profiles with fewer followers than this value (0 = no filter).

maxTweetsPerProfile.title: Max Recent Tweets Per Profile
maxTweetsPerProfile.description: Number of recent tweets to scrape per profile.

downloadThumbnails.title: Download Profile Pics & Media to Key-Value Store
downloadThumbnails.description: If enabled, profile pictures and tweet media images are downloaded and stored in the actor's Key-Value store.

googleApiKey.title: Google Custom Search API Key
googleApiKey.description: Optional. If provided together with googleSearchEngineId, uses Google Custom Search for discovery instead of DuckDuckGo.

googleSearchEngineId.title: Google Custom Search Engine ID (CX)
googleSearchEngineId.description: Optional. The Custom Search Engine ID (cx) to use with the Google API key.

skipProxyValidation.title: Skip Proxy Validation
skipProxyValidation.description: Skip the proxy connectivity check before scraping. Useful when the proxy is known to work but blocks common test sites.

dropProxyOnFailure.title: Drop Proxy if Validation Fails
dropProxyOnFailure.description: If proxy validation fails, disable the proxy and run directly. By default the proxy is kept even if validation fails.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. Recommended: use Apify Residential proxies to avoid rate-limiting by Twitter/X.
